content.body:
collectFiles now stops descending into subdirectories that contain
their own .leo/ directory, preventing cross-scope contamination.

Adds MultiScan(ctx, []ScanTarget, Config) and ScanTarget struct to
scan multiple repo roots independently, each writing to its own .leo/.

Updates runBootstrap to detect user/org scope and fan out to
runMultiRepoBootstrap, which scans each initialized child repo
separately and groups progress output by repo name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add .leo/ boundary detection and MultiScan for multi-repo bootstrap
content.summary:
